text.title: vr-design-patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree by audience profile + scene type to locomotion + comfort defaults. Each leaf references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: default=teleport but smooth/arm-swing available; turning=snap default
add seated toggle to comfort menu

text.example: audience=novice → default=teleport, turning=snap → scenes have horizon → UI world-anchored → accessibility complete → spec valid.
